rationale: The proposed change concerns the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). Elec. Code §253.1612 governs judicial candidate campaign activities. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: The Code of Judicial Conduct may not prohibit, and a judicial candidate may not be penalized for, a joint campaign activity conducted by two or more judicial candidates.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and judicial campaign conduct rules.
